CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Continued To Aug-04-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of And Unopposed Motion For Entry Of Dismissal Without Prejudice Of Plaintiffs Tenth Cause Of Action Under The Private Attorneys General Act And Dismissal Of Balance Of Action With Prejudice
Off Calendar Feb-24-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE SFO FORECAST INC.'S Unopposed Motion For Entry Of Dismissal Without Prejudice Of Plaintiffs Tenth Cause Of Action Under The Private Attorneys General Act And Dismissal Of Balance Of Action With Prejudice.

The motion for entry of dismissal without prejudice is denied without prejudice.

Plaintiff has filed an action under PAGA. Labor Code, Sec. 2699, subdivision (s)(2) states, "The superior court shall review and approve any settlement of any civil action filed pursuant to this part. The proposed settlement shall be submitted to the agency at the same time that it is submitted to the court." Although Plaintiff has settled the action individually, this civil action was filed pursuant to PAGA and the court must assess whether it is fair to absent aggrieved employees. Plaintiff's motion provides insufficient information for the court to make that assessment, and does not provide proof that the proposed settlement was submitted to LWDA.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
